metadata.name: Model Validation Requirements
metadata.description: Ensures models undergo proper validation before production deployment

rules.name: Initial validation completed
rules.description: Models must complete initial validation before deployment
rules.remediation: Submit model for validation and obtain approval before deployment

rules.name: Performance metrics within thresholds
rules.description: Model performance metrics must meet minimum standards
rules.remediation: Improve model performance to meet minimum AUC (0.7) and accuracy (0.8) thresholds

rules.name: Backtesting completed
rules.description: Models must have recent backtesting results
rules.remediation: Run backtesting and ensure results meet standards

rules.name: Risk rating assigned
rules.description: All models must have a risk rating
rules.remediation: Assign appropriate risk rating based on model impact assessment

rules.name: High-risk models require enhanced validation
rules.description: Models rated high or critical risk require additional validation steps
rules.remediation: Obtain independent review and senior management approval for high-risk models
